name: clipboard-ai
description: In-memory clipboard with history and smart paste operations. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: copy_text
tools.description: Copy text to the clipboard. Optionally add a label for easy retrieval.

tools.name: paste_text
tools.description: Retrieve the current clipboard contents. Format options: raw, trimmed, lines, json_pretty, escaped.

tools.name: clipboard_history
tools.description: View clipboard history. Optionally search/filter by text content or label.

tools.name: clear_clipboard
tools.description: Clear the current clipboard. Optionally clear entire history.
